$meta.purpose: Machine-readable design rules for AI-driven design generation

float-1.usage: Soft decorative floating animation for illustration items.

float-2.usage: Lagged floating animation used on secondary illustrations for depth variance.

hover-state.usage: Use for all standard clickable elements, sidebar navigation rows, and buttons.

layout-change.usage: Use for panel sizing transitions, such as expanding/collapsing the sidebar width.

popover-reveal.usage: Use for opening dropdown selects and user menus.

rules.name: Restraint on decoration
rules.rule: Animations must never interfere with the readability or density of the dashboard. Restrict complex motion to illustrations; UI elements must trigger fast, predictable changes.
